title: Things I Forgot to Mention (Part Two)

sentences.en: Monday. Turns out one catch-up entry was not nearly enough, so here is part two of things I somehow forgot to write down this year.
sentences.zh: 星期一。結果一篇補寫日記根本不夠，所以這裡是今年我不知怎麼忘記寫下來的第二部分。

sentences.en: I never mentioned that a real policeman visited our school once to explain, in simple terms, why running across a busy road is a genuinely stupid idea.
sentences.zh: 我從沒提過，有一次一位真正的員警來我們學校，用簡單的方式解釋為什麼在車多的馬路上狂奔，真的是一個很蠢的主意。

sentences.en: I forgot to mention Sophia's old china teacup set, decorated with a delicate rose pattern, which she only takes out for guests she truly respects.
sentences.zh: 我忘了提 Sophia 那組舊瓷器茶具，上面畫著細緻的玫瑰圖案，她只有在真正尊敬的客人來訪時，才會拿出來用。

sentences.en: There was a day I forgot to record when Perry got strangely alive with energy after eating something salty he was not supposed to touch.
sentences.zh: 有一天我忘了記下來，Perry 吃了不該吃的鹹味食物後，變得莫名地精力旺盛。

sentences.en: I never mentioned that William went through a brief, intense phase of being obsessed with becoming a firefighter, a fighter pilot, and a chef, all in the same single week.
sentences.zh: 我從沒提過，William 有一段短暫又強烈的迷戀期，同一個星期裡先後想當消防員、戰鬥機飛行員，還有主廚。

sentences.en: I forgot to describe how bored William gets during long car rides, to the point where he once tried to nap standing up against the car door.
sentences.zh: 我忘了描述 William 在長途車程裡有多無聊，無聊到有一次他試著靠著車門站著打瞌睡。

sentences.en: There was a moment I never described: Bernice, in a rare quiet mood, admitted she sometimes feels lonely even in a room full of friends.
sentences.zh: 有個時刻我從沒描述過：Bernice 難得情緒安靜下來，坦白說她有時候就算身處滿是朋友的房間裡，還是會覺得孤單。

sentences.en: I never mentioned my brief, stupid idea to bite into a whole lemon just to prove I was brave, an idea my sour face instantly regretted.
sentences.zh: 我從沒提過我那個蠢主意：為了證明自己很勇敢，一整顆咬下一片檸檬，結果我那張酸到不行的臉馬上就後悔了。

sentences.en: I forgot to mention that Dad once tried to fry an egg using a completely new method he saw online, and it went about as well as you would expect.
sentences.zh: 我忘了提，爸爸有次試著用他在網路上看到的一個全新方法煎蛋，結果大概跟你想的一樣，不怎麼順利。

sentences.en: There was an afternoon I never wrote about: a sudden, brief rainstorm sent the whole street running for shelter under one narrow shop roof.
sentences.zh: 有個下午我從沒寫過：一場突然又短暫的大雨，讓整條街的人都跑到同一個窄窄的店家屋簷下避雨。

sentences.en: I forgot to mention that our class chief representative, elected at the start of the year, turned out to be far more responsible than anyone expected.
sentences.zh: 我忘了提，我們班學期初選出來的班長，最後展現的責任感遠超過大家的預期。

sentences.en: I never described the pleasant surprise of finding an old photo of baby William, pale and confused-looking, tucked inside an old family album.
sentences.zh: 我從沒描述過那個小小的驚喜：在一本舊家庭相簿裡，發現了一張 William 嬰兒時期的照片，臉色蒼白又一臉困惑。

sentences.en: I forgot to mention the school nurse's protective advice about applying sunscreen before any outdoor activity, advice William routinely ignores.
sentences.zh: 我忘了提校護關於戶外活動前要塗防曬乳的保護性建議，這個建議 William 一直習慣性地無視。

sentences.en: There was a night I never wrote about: William got so excited about a minor achievement, a perfect spelling test, that he could hardly sleep at all.
sentences.zh: 有天晚上我從沒寫過：William 因為一個小小的成就，一次完美的拼字測驗，興奮到幾乎睡不著。

sentences.en: I forgot to mention that Bernice once tried to arrange her entire bedroom based on a design she saw online, and it lasted exactly three days before returning to normal chaos.
sentences.zh: 我忘了提，Bernice 有一次試著照網路上看到的一個設計把整間臥室重新擺設，結果只撐了三天就恢復成正常的混亂。

sentences.en: Lesson of this second catch-up entry: apparently my memory is not the most suitable tool for holding an entire year, but this notebook still manages to catch most of it.
sentences.zh: 第二篇補寫日記的心得：顯然我的記憶力不是保存一整年最合適的工具，但這本筆記本還是幫忙抓住了大部分內容。

quiz.question: What does the real policeman explain to the school?
options: Why running across a busy road is a genuinely stupid idea.
How to report a lost pet.
How to open a bank account.

quiz.question: What does Bernice admit in a rare quiet moment?
options: She sometimes feels lonely even in a room full of friends.
She wants to quit the diary project.

quiz.question: What keeps William awake one night, unable to sleep?
options: Excitement over a perfect spelling test.
